title: VulpesMC
body:
![Made for VulpesMC](data:image/png;base64,) ### Note This is not the Offically released VulpesMC Modpack, this is a version created by the staff member Lupancham. Do not ask other VulpesMC Staff Members including SteveStan for Modpack Support ## About (Un)Official modpack for the VulpesMC Geo-pol Minecraft server. This pack will only be available on Modrinth. If you wish to join the server without the modpack, it is recommended that allow the recomended resource pack it prompts you to download when you join and enable Simple Voicechat. The modpack adds Voice Chat, QOL, Mini/World Maps, and much more for the player playing VulpesMC! Many of these mods are hand picked by me or suggested/used by other players. ## Player Resources
Replay Mod With replay mod, you can save moments while playing and render them into videos! Reference this video if you wish to use the mod. [FFMPEG](https://ffmpeg.org/) is required to export videos!
Vulpes MC Wiki With the wiki you can learn more about the server, how things work, and use it when you aren't sure about something! --> [vulpesmc.gitbook.io](https://vulpesmc.gitbook.io/)
